name: Sirsa Main Market
tagline: The heart of Sirsa's trade — everything under one sky

directions.tips: Autos readily available from Sirsa Railway Station. Ask for 'Clock Tower' — every driver knows it.

name: Rania Bazaar
tagline: Sirsa's best-kept secret for fashion at unbeatable prices
location: Rania Road, Near Bus Stand, Sirsa

directions.tips: Shared autos run on the Sirsa–Rania route. Alight at 'Rania Chowk' and the bazaar is a 2-min walk.

name: Grain Market (Anaj Mandi)
tagline: Where Haryana's agricultural bounty meets everyday life

directions.tips: Tell the auto driver 'Anaj Mandi'. Busy in early mornings — arrive by 8AM for best experience.

name: Sabzi Mandi (Vegetable Market)
tagline: Fresh from the farm to your plate every single morning

directions.tips: Very close to the Old Bus Stand. If arriving by train, take an auto to 'Old Bus Stand' and walk 3 mins.

name: Hanumangarh Road Market
tagline: Hardware, tools and building supplies for every project

directions.tips: Autos are the easiest option from the city centre. Ask for 'Hanumangarh Road Market'.

name: Dhobiana Bazaar
tagline: Sirsa's legendary street food & budget shopping destination

directions.tips: Ask for 'Dhobiana Mohalla' — a well-known locality. No parking nearby so prefer auto or on foot.

name: Sector 17 Fashion Market
tagline: Modern fashion, trendy accessories, and lifestyle brands

directions.tips: Autos available from city centre. Tell driver 'Sector 17 Market'. Parking is available on weekdays.

name: Jewelry & Gold Market
tagline: Timeless gold, silver and precious jewellery since generations

directions.tips: Ask for 'Ganesh Chowk' — a central landmark. The jewelry lane is 1 min walk from the chowk.

name: Electronics Hub
tagline: Gadgets, mobile phones and tech accessories at best prices

directions.tips: Tell the auto 'Subhash Nagar Electronics Market'. Multiple repair shops also available here.

name: Purani Dilli Bazaar (Sirsa)
tagline: Old world charm meets everyday needs in the old city lanes

directions.tips: Very close to the railway station. Walk or take a short auto to 'Old City Chowk'. Narrow lanes — leave vehicles outside.

name: Chandni Chowk
tagline: Delhi's oldest & grandest bazaar — 400 years of trade in every lane
bestTimeToVisit: Weekday Mornings (9AM–12PM). Avoid Sunday — most shops closed.
location: Chandni Chowk Road, Old Delhi, Delhi — 110006

directions.metroWalkTime: 2 min walk (exit gate 4, the market starts immediately)
directions.railwayDistance: 0.8 km, 10 min walk or 5 min cycle-rickshaw
directions.tips: Metro is the BEST option — park your car at Kashmere Gate and take Yellow Line to Chandni Chowk. Cycle-rickshaws are iconic here and great for short hops inside the bazaar. Do NOT drive into the market lanes — it's a pedestrian zone.

name: Sarojini Nagar Market
tagline: Delhi's fashion capital — export surplus & street style at rock-bottom prices
bestTimeToVisit: Weekday mornings (10AM–12PM). Saturdays are extremely crowded.

directions.nearestMetro: Sarojini Nagar — Pink Line (exit gate 1, 2 min walk)
directions.tips: Metro is perfect — alight at Sarojini Nagar station (Pink Line). Arrive by 10AM on weekdays for thin crowds and first pick. Carry a big bag and cash — most vendors don't accept cards.

name: Lajpat Nagar Central Market
tagline: Ethnic wear, home décor & wedding shopping — all in one buzzing bazaar
location: Central Market, Lajpat Nagar II, New Delhi — 110024

directions.nearestMetro: Lajpat Nagar — Pink Line (direct access from exit 1)
directions.tips: One of Delhi's best-connected markets. Metro Pink Line drops you at the market entrance. Auto and e-rickshaws available from the metro exit. Avoid Saturday evening — peak crowd.

name: Karol Bagh Market
tagline: Electronics, bridal wear and cosmetics — the all-rounder of Delhi markets
location: Ajmal Khan Road, Karol Bagh, New Delhi — 110005

directions.nearestMetro: Karol Bagh — Blue Line (exit 2, market is 3 min walk)
directions.tips: Blue Line Metro is most convenient. Get off at Karol Bagh station. The main Ajmal Khan Road market is walkable. For Gaffar Market (mobiles), take a 5-min walk north of the station.

name: Gaffar Market
tagline: Delhi's biggest mobile phone & electronics grey market
location: Gaffar Market Road, Karol Bagh, New Delhi — 110005

directions.nearestMetro: Karol Bagh — Blue Line (5 min walk north of station)
directions.tips: From Karol Bagh metro, exit and walk north on Arya Samaj Road for 5 mins. The market is in a lane to your left. Always verify IMEI before buying any device.

name: Janpath Market
tagline: Trinkets, handicrafts and bohemian fashion — a traveller's treasure chest
location: Janpath Lane, Connaught Place, New Delhi — 110001

directions.nearestMetro: Rajiv Chowk — Blue & Yellow Line (exit 7, 5 min walk)
directions.tips: Rajiv Chowk is the central hub — from there Janpath is a 5-min walk. Bargain hard — vendors quote double the fair price to tourists.

name: Palika Bazaar
tagline: Delhi's iconic underground market — electronics, fashion and more

directions.nearestMetro: Rajiv Chowk — Blue & Yellow Line (the market entrance is RIGHT at exit 7)
directions.tips: The market entrance is underground at Rajiv Chowk junction — you literally walk down from the Metro exit. Bargain extremely hard here — opening prices are 3x the fair value.

name: Nehru Place IT Market
tagline: South Asia's largest computer & IT products market — all things tech
bestTimeToVisit: Weekday mornings (10AM–1PM). Market closed on Sundays.

directions.nearestMetro: Nehru Place — Violet Line (exit 1, market is directly outside)
directions.tips: Violet Line Metro is fastest. Get off at Nehru Place station — the market towers are right outside. Carry your laptop for repairs — dozens of reliable service centres. Closed on Sundays.

name: Dilli Haat (INA)
tagline: India's 29 states under one roof — crafts, cuisine and culture

directions.nearestMetro: INA — Pink & Yellow Line (exit 3, market gate is 3 min walk)
directions.tips: INA Metro is right next to the market. Entry fee: ₹80 for adults. Rotating stalls from different states — check which state is featured during your visit.

name: Khan Market
tagline: Delhi's most expensive high street — boutiques, books and world-class cafes

directions.nearestMetro: Khan Market — Violet Line (exit 1, market is 2 min walk)
directions.tips: Violet Line Metro is the best option. Parking is very scarce — Metro recommended. Khan Market Road is one-way; tell auto driver your specific destination shop.

name: Kamla Nagar Market
tagline: Delhi University's favourite budget market — fashion, food and fun

directions.nearestMetro: Vishwavidyalaya — Yellow Line (10 min walk or e-rickshaw)
directions.tips: From Vishwavidyalaya Metro, e-rickshaws run directly to Kamla Nagar Market (₹10). Very student-friendly — food prices are remarkably low.

name: Connaught Place (CP)
tagline: The iconic circular hub of Delhi — premium brands, cafes and great vibes

directions.nearestMetro: Rajiv Chowk — Blue & Yellow Line (the market encircles the metro station)
directions.nearestBusStop: Connaught Place (Multiple bus stops on outer ring)
directions.tips: Rajiv Chowk Metro is literally at the centre of CP — the best option by far. The market is divided into A–N blocks arranged in concentric circles. Inner circle has premium shops; outer has affordable options.

name: Sector 18 Market (Noida)
tagline: Noida's most vibrant commercial hub — malls, street shops and great food

directions.nearestMetro: Noida Sector 18 — Blue Line (exit 2, market is 1 min walk)
directions.tips: Blue Line Metro directly connects Delhi to Noida Sector 18 — most convenient option from Delhi. E-rickshaws ferry people within the market area. Atta Market and Great India Place mall are adjacent.

name: Atta Market (Noida)
tagline: Noida's everyday neighbourhood market for fresh produce and daily needs

directions.nearestMetro: Noida Sector 18 — Blue Line (3 min walk)
directions.tips: Adjacent to Sector 18 Metro. Walk out and turn left — Atta Market is next to the main market complex. E-rickshaws from the station entrance.

name: Cyber Hub (Gurugram)
tagline: Gurgaon's premium F&B and retail destination — rooftop bars, global cuisine
location: DLF Cyber City, Phase 2, Gurugram, Haryana — 122002

directions.nearestMetro: Cyber City — Rapid Metro (direct metro station inside the complex)
directions.tips: Rapid Metro (Cyber City station) is inside the DLF Cyber City complex — the easiest option. From Delhi, take Yellow Line to HUDA City Centre and switch to Rapid Metro. Parking is available but expensive on weekends.

name: Sadar Bazaar (Gurugram)
tagline: Old Gurgaon's traditional market — authentic, affordable and local

directions.nearestMetro: Guru Dronacharya — Yellow Line (2 km, 10 min auto)
directions.metroWalkTime: Not walkable — take 10 min auto from metro
directions.tips: Easiest from Gurgaon Railway Station — 8 min auto. From Metro, get off at Guru Dronacharya and take an auto to 'Old Gurgaon Sadar Bazaar'.

name: Bhagirathi Palace (Batti Market)
tagline: Asia's largest electrical goods wholesale market — trade only
location: Chandni Chowk, Near Fatehpuri, Old Delhi — 110006

directions.nearestMetro: Chandni Chowk — Yellow Line (7 min walk west toward Fatehpuri)
directions.tips: Best reached from Chandni Chowk Metro. Walk west on the main road toward Fatehpuri Mosque. The electrical market lanes start just before the Mosque. Wholesale quantities usually required.

name: Vaishali Market (Ghaziabad)
tagline: Ghaziabad's well-planned commercial hub for everyday and lifestyle needs

directions.nearestMetro: Vaishali — Blue Line (the market is 3 min walk from station)
directions.tips: Blue Line Metro terminates at Vaishali — very easy from Delhi. Market is walkable from the metro exit. E-rickshaws available for deeper parts of the sector.
